commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f1b25070cfd71fa505a371cb1fcf400521679459)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Nextcloud Talk webhook decoding to parse JSON before strict Note schema validation and adds replay tests for malformed JSON, Document events, and setup pings.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +77. Total +109 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.6.8 map signed schema misses to HTTP 400 before classifying valid non-message events, and PR-head source still shows Note-shaped reaction hooks hitting the 400 guard. I did not run a live Nextcloud server in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer action to fix the classifier gap and provide real-path proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's external environment proof.

target.title: fix(nextcloud-talk): return 200 for non-message webhook events instead of 400
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
